metadata.title: Dooform - Build Forms That Convert
metadata.description: Create beautiful, responsive forms in minutes. No coding required.

business.title: Supports Diverse Businesses
business.description: In addition to the government documents Dooform provides, you can also use Dooform's syntax to manage documents already in your system.

developer.title: Developer Friendly
developer.description: Business API Webhook designed to make it even easier for developers to integrate with Dooform.

performance.title: Fast Processing
performance.description: If your business needs to manage and export a large number of documents, you can call the API to generate up to 1,000 files per 10 seconds.

card1.title: Dooform Understands Business Owners & Translators
card1.description: Designed to streamline document workflows for business owners and professional translators alike.

card2.title: Dooform Understands Business Owners & Translators
card2.description: Designed to streamline document workflows for business owners and professional translators alike.

card3.title: Reduce Document Filling Time
card3.description: Automate repetitive document tasks and cut down on manual data entry with smart form processing.

pricing.heading: Pricing Plans
pricing.subtitle: Choose a plan that fits your needs
pricing.footnote: All plans are billed monthly. All prices in ฿THB.

starter.name: Starter
features: View stored data up to 90 days

plus.name: Plus
features: View stored data up to 1 year
Add up to 10 organization document sets

video.heading: How Dooform Helps Reduce Business Costs

partners.heading: Trusted by Leading Organizations
partners.subtitle: Dooform serves organizations across many industries

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Supports official government documents for translation and embassy submission

items.question: National ID Card
items.answer: Supports filling and translating Thai national ID cards into English in embassy-accepted formats.

items.question: Birth Certificate
items.answer: Supports filling and translating Thai birth certificates into English in embassy-accepted formats.

items.question: House Registration
items.answer: Supports filling and translating Thai house registrations into English in embassy-accepted formats.

items.question: Marriage Certificate
items.answer: Supports filling and translating Thai marriage certificates into English in embassy-accepted formats.

items.question: Others
items.answer: Supports additional official government documents. Contact us for more information.

trial.heading: Try for Free
trial.subtitle: Simply register and start filling in your data right away
trial.consent: By registering, you consent to the collection of your usage data.
